name: MetLife Inc. Depositary shares each representing a 1/1000th interest in a share of the Issuera??s 5.625% Non-Cumulative Preferred Stock Series E.
summary: MetLife Inc. Depositary shares each representing a 1/1000th interest in a share of the Issuera??s 5.625% Non-Cumulative Preferred Stock Series E represent fractional ownership in preferred shares of MetLife. The preferred shares offer a fixed dividend payment. The issuer is MetLife, a global insurance company.
